topic.title: Tomorrow's Guest Speaker: Khushboo Gajwani
topic.text:
Hi all,

Khushboo Gajwani is Manager of Social Media at Gallo Legal Services and a Northeastern alum. She was Social Media Director for Humanitarians AI, where she grew engagement and follower count by over 500%. Her career spans agency work at FCB Kinnect, a digital marketing co-op at Numerated (a Moody's company), and social media management for Northeastern's Husky Card Services — she knows what it means to wear many hats and make each one count.

Tomorrow she'll be talking about why versatility is your superpower and how to strengthen your social media presence.

Check out her LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/khushboo-gajwani05/

Please have your camera on and come prepared with questions. Khushboo has built her career by jumping across industries and making it work every time — this is your chance to learn how.

Thanks, Prof. Nik & Nina
